title: Senescence β-galactosidase staining assay in cultured cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3gwrp","text":"This protocol describes senescence-associated β-galactosidase staining in cultured cells using a commercial staining kit to assess cellular senescence by light microscopy.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"ssaia","text":"- Perform all steps at room temperature unless otherwise indicated.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fmfvo","text":"- Prepare thestaining solution fresh before use.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6cv7z","text":"- Use a dry incubator without CO2 for the staining reaction.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":22,"length":7},{"style":"sub","offset":32,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7wuy3","text":"- Handle fixative and X-gal substrate according to institutional safety guidelines.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"hgbhh","text":"- Staining time may vary depending on cell type and senescence level.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"qhwzr","text":"- Do not use a CO2 incubator during the staining step, as CO2 can alter pH.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":17,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":60,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vttow","text":"- Include untreated and positive control samples for accurate interpretation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Culture cells under experimental conditions until ready for senescence analysis.
(Optional positive control) Treat cells with 1 µM doxorubicin for 6 h prior to fixation to induce senescence-associated β-galactosidase activity.
Fix cells with 1x Fixative Solution (provided in the Senescence β-Galactosidase Staining Kit, Cell Signaling Technology, 9860) for 10–15 min at room temperature.
Prepare fresh β-galactosidase staining solution (pH 6.0) containing X-gal substrate according to the manufacturer’s instructions.
Add staining solution to completely cover cells.
Incubate cells at 37°C in a dry incubator without CO2 for 72 h.
Examine cells under a light microscope.
Identify senescent cells by the presence of blue staining.
Senescent cells exhibit clear blue β-galactosidase staining, whereas non-senescent cells remain unstained.
creator: Xin Xu
